channel.title: flove making-of — vizy questions
channel.description: New vizy design questions from flove interviews.

item.title: Should vizy recover its XR/VR direction?
item.description:
• Recover from git — Restore the old VR code, update it, and continue the XR/VR direction. • Abandon VR — Drop XR/VR entirely — focus vizy on web-based visualization. Simpler, lower risk. • Defer again — Don't decide now — revisit when vizy's core is stable.
★ decided: — · ◇ recommended: Abandon VR
